description: Synthetic notes/docs corpus for creation, editing, retrieval, and summarization tasks.

documents.title: Launch Checklist
documents.content: Finalize copy, verify analytics events, confirm support handoff, and publish FAQ before launch day.

documents.title: Search Quality Notes
documents.content: Precision improved after ranking tweak, but recall still drops for long multi-topic queries.

documents.title: Customer Interview Summary
documents.content: Admins love audit visibility but struggle with onboarding complexity and report latency.

documents.title: Engineering Decision Log
documents.content: Team chose checkpointed retries over aggressive parallel retries to reduce flaky integration failures.
